ksa_text: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-019 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.453 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.453) and is edge_case for the Statistician role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.453), and AI and Machine Learning handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Statistical ML (Bayesian methods, regression, predictive modeling) in 40-60% of Statistician postings. Deep learning engineering is not a core Statistician competency.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Statistical ML (Bayesian methods, regression, predictive modeling) in 40-60% of Statistician postings. Final decision: exclude.
